ph_02_size.justification: Data-heavy: 130 lines vendored schema (verbatim from upstream) + 389 lines canonical entity data (15 near-identical Step records, ~26 lines each) + 356 lines test scaffolding. No logic surface.

architecture.note: data file + test only; no resilience/observability/secrets surface

security.note: no auth/authz/IO/network surface; tenant ULID is deterministic hash not secret

quality.note: all 7 quality outputs produced; no dead surface, no contract drift, tests proportional to contract surface, no CR-10 anti-patterns
